moon: Modeling Obesity in Norway (MOON) Markov Cohort Model

Source: R/moon-package.R
moon-package.Rd

Implements the MOON Markov cohort model for simulating obesity prevalence, incremental health-care costs, and years of life lost in a Norwegian birth cohort over the life course. Originally described in Bjørnelv et al. (2021) doi:10.1177/0272989X20971589 ; this package is an R port and refactor of the Excel/VBA implementation.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/DaCHE-SDU/moon

  • https://dache-sdu.github.io/moon
